title: Set up next-safe-action for type-safe Server Actions
summary: Add next-safe-action v7 for fully validated, type-safe Server Actions with Zod input schemas, middleware support (auth, logging), and the useAction hook for optimistic UI.
declaration: I will set up next-safe-action v7 for type-safe, validated Server Actions in your Next.js application. It wraps Server Actions with Zod validation, middleware, and typed return values. If you prefer raw Server Actions without this library, say so before I begin.
